name: Private Key File Access
description: Detects access or copying of private key files
query:
// Detect private key file access
// Trigger on reading or copying SSH/TLS private keys
events from edr_process
where cmdline matches "(?i)(cat|cp|scp|type|copy).*(id_rsa|id_ed25519|id_ecdsa|\.pem|\.key|\.pfx|\.p12|private.*key)"
group by hostname
having count(*) > 0
within 120 seconds
